patches_applied: PATCH-1: Add quote_time alias (canonical REST contract) as fallback for timestamp in post_ea_market_stream handler. $timestamp_raw = quote_time ?? timestamp ?? null used throughout staleness check, M1/M15 stream timestamps, and audit log.
PATCH-2: Add candles[] array shim — if 'candle' absent and 'candles' array present, candles[0] is promoted as M1 candle object (tick_volume mapped to volume).
PATCH-3: Update post_ea_market_stream docblock to document canonical REST contract (quote_time/source/server_time/candles[]) alongside legacy EA format (timestamp/candle/candle_m15).
PATCH-4: test-ea-market-stream.php: added Tests 12-14 covering quote_time alias, candles[] array shim, and stale quote_time rejection.

blockers_addressed: BUG-001: quote_time alias support added — canonical REST contract now accepted
BUG-002: audit log now records resolved timestamp_raw (not null when quote_time used)
BUG-003: docblock updated to document both payload formats
remaining_blockers: MIGRATION-001: NAS100/US30 freshness — code fix merged in prior PRs; 4-hour live validation soak required during active US equity session
MIGRATION-002: XAUUSD candle history — GOLD alias fix merged; EA restart + 7.5h accumulation required before candle-history gate passes
MIGRATION-003: Phase 0 closeout — blocked pending MIGRATION-001 and MIGRATION-002 live validation
migration_status_post_patch.phase_readiness: Phase 0 BLOCKED. Code patches from 2026-05-14 and 2026-05-15 are merged. Live validation soaks are required. Phase 1 cannot start until Phase 0 closeout gate is cleared.
